holdings.n: BLK CSH FND TREASURY SL AGENCY

overview.description: The iShares BBB-B CLO Active ETF (BCLO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund actively invests in a portfolio of collateralized loan obligations rated from BBB+ to B-, and of any maturity. These securities are primarily denominated in USD, but may also be denominated in foreign currencies. BCLO was launched on Jan 29, 2025 and is issued by BlackRock.
